response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 20 years of development experience and solid developer tools work, but critically lacks the required people management experience. All roles listed are individual contributor positions, and the job explicitly requires 2 years of people management/team leadership as a core responsibility. Without demonstrated ability to conduct one-on-ones, develop team members, and manage performance expectations, the candidate is not yet ready for this manager-level role.
strengths: 20 years of software development across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) showing technical depth
Direct experience with developer tooling and testing infrastructure (CI/CD, test runners, TDD practices, GitLab/Docker setup)
Strong teaching and mentoring background through workshops, talks, and open-source projects demonstrating ability to share knowledge
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience—all roles are individual contributor positions; lacks required 2 years of team leadership
Limited CI/CD and build infrastructure depth compared to role requirements; only ~1-2 years vs. required 3 years in developer tools
Current Staff Engineer role appears to be IC track, not management trajectory; no evidence of roadmap ownership, performance feedback, or organizational change leadership

key_factors.factor: Technical expertise in developer tools and testing
